title: Linen Blend Shirt
description: Breathable long-sleeve shirt with a relaxed fit for daily comfort and polished casual style.
alt: Folded beige linen blend shirt on a wooden table.

title: Classic Sneakers
description: Minimal sneakers with cushioned insoles and flexible outsole for all-day wear.
alt: Pair of white sneakers against a light background.

title: Chrono Wrist Watch
description: Modern stainless steel watch with matte black dial and water-resistant construction.
alt: Silver wrist watch with black dial displayed upright.

title: Noise-Canceling Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones with adaptive noise canceling and up to 30-hour battery life.
alt: Black over-ear headphones resting on a light desk.

title: Smart Home Speaker
description: Compact smart speaker with voice assistant integration and rich 360-degree sound.
alt: Small gray smart speaker on a white shelf.

title: Portable Power Bank
description: 20,000 mAh fast-charging power bank with dual USB-C outputs for travel convenience.
alt: Slim black power bank connected to a smartphone.

title: Ceramic Dinner Set
description: Durable 16-piece ceramic set including plates, bowls, and mugs in matte finish.
alt: Stacked ceramic plates and bowls in neutral tones.

title: Scented Soy Candle
description: Hand-poured soy candle with cedar and vanilla notes, designed for long clean burn.
alt: Lit soy candle in a glass jar on a coffee table.

title: Textured Throw Blanket
description: Throw blanket that adds warmth and texture to sofas or beds.
alt: Throw blanket draped over a sofa armrest.
